creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-02-12 19:27:38 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/rackmonkey  Makefile distinfo pkg-deinstall pkg-descr 
                         pkg-plist 
    net-mgmt/rackmonkey/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  RackMonkey is a web-based tool for managing racks of equipment
  such as web servers, video encoders, routers and storage devices.
  Using a simple interface you can keep track of what's where,
  which OS it runs, when it was purchased, who it belongs and what
  it's used for.
  
  WWW: http://flux.org.uk/projects/rackmonkey/
  
  PR:             ports/143750
  Submitted by:   Eric F Crist <ecrist at secure-computing.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.214     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +90 -0     ports/net-mgmt/rackmonkey/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/rackmonkey/distinfo (new)

  1.1       +16 -0     ports/net-mgmt/rackmonkey/pkg-deinstall (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/net-mgmt/rackmonkey/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +145 -0    ports/net-mgmt/rackmonkey/pkg-plist (new)
